attributes.action: Stop filling the potholes and repave the roads instead
attributes.additional_details: Lots of Drivers are having to dangerously avoid potholes, hitting potholes and ruining their wheels, tyres and suspension (which they’re having to pay for out of their hard earned). It’s time to resurface the roads correctly and stop with the patchwork quilts! Pot hole repairs are a money making racket, let’s use taxes correctly to build long lasting, quality tarmac!
attributes.background: Stop handing out over priced contracts to patch in holes, give contracts to companies who will resurface the roads correctly at a reasonable cost.

rejection.details:
We have quite a few petitions on potholes already open: 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions?state=open&q=potholes

This one in particular deals with more general road maintenance, which you may wish to sign:

Require contractors to guarantee all roadworks for 2 years https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760798
